a.label: delta_k
a.standard_term: parity-dependent degree/count constant (2^{k-1}, corrected by a central binomial coefficient for even k) counting sign-vector classes in the norm-form arrangement

b.label: E = F_0(u)(w_1,...,w_k)
b.standard_term: multiquadratic extension field generated by the k radicals w_i = sqrt(u+N_i^2)

evidence.label: Axial family setup: E, sigma, N_k(u;M), delta_k
evidence.summary:
E = F_0(u)(w_1, ..., w_k),   w_i^2 = u + N_i^2,
sigma = w_1 + ... + w_k in E,
N_k(u; M) = prod over eta in {+-1}^k of (4M - sum_i eta_i w_i)
          = Norm_{E / F_0(u)} (4M - sigma),
delta_k = 2^(k-1)
